changes.before: Then the wind got under her hood, and the bay and the ship came back hard.
changes.after: Then the wind got under her hood, and she thought of the bay and the ship again.

changes.before: Jaina rode two lengths ahead of the rear guard and one behind Sylvanas because nobody had discussed the spacing and the spacing had arrived anyway.
changes.after: Jaina rode two lengths ahead of the rear guard and one behind Sylvanas because nobody had discussed it and the formation had settled that way anyway.

changes.before: The difference, if there was one, had better be more than disgust.

changes.after: Her split lip lifted at one corner.

changes.before: Antonidas turned a fraction, hearing the older wound under the new question.
changes.after: Antonidas turned a fraction at Jaina's voice.
